retry_reason: The skb is freed on failure; retrying with the same skb is impossible. A new aggregation attempt would require a fresh skb, not a retry of this call.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to aggregate netmem into an skb (via __bnge_rx_agg_netmems) and then either return the skb or free it if aggregation yields no fragments. The refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb) is a conditional side effect of the failure path, not the main purpose. The aggregation call constitutes significant non-refcount logic.
